\singlespacing

# Glossary {-}

 
**F** \newline 
 
Fifth concept.
: Definition of the fifth concept. This is an attempt to have more than one line for a definition in order to check how the spacing works. \newline 
 
First concept.
: Definition of the fifth concept. This is an attempt to have more than one line for a definition in order to check how the spacing works. \newline 
 
Fourth concept.
: Definition of the fifth concept. This is an attempt to have more than one line for a definition in order to check how the spacing works. \newline 
 


 
**S** \newline 
 
Second concept.
: Definition of the fifth concept. This is an attempt to have more than one line for a definition in order to check how the spacing works. \newline 
 
Seventh concept.
: Definition of the fifth concept. This is an attempt to have more than one line for a definition in order to check how the spacing works. \newline 
 
Sixth concept.
: Definition of the fifth concept. This is an attempt to have more than one line for a definition in order to check how the spacing works. \newline 
 


 
**T** \newline 
 
Third concept.
: Definition of the fifth concept. This is an attempt to have more than one line for a definition in order to check how the spacing works. \newline
